creator: slochau

testElementDTOList.targetRawValue:
-->

Pressure Values: Tidal value and PEEP


In this test, the applied PEEP and tidal volume are tested. For each partial test, the sequence is:

(ASL)->(Setup)->(Exec)->(Scripting)->(Evaluation)->(CleanUp)

  • (ASL)-Block: Sets ASL resistance and compliance according to the product requirements.
  • (Setup)-Block: Sets predefined values according to the product requirements.
  • (Exec)-Block:
    1. Starts ventilation.
    2. Waits for 90 seconds.
    3. Stores one measurement of Vti and Vte read from the FlowAnalyser in [VTE_FlowAnalyser], [VTI_FlowAnalyser].
      4. The block takes two measurements from the ventilator, in case the first one is invalid.
  • (Scripting)-Block
    1. Calculates VT from the FlowAnalyser and stores it in the variable [VT_FlowAnalyser]: VT = (VTI + VTE) /2 .
  • (Evaluation)-Block:
    1. Evaluates PEEP measured by the ventilator
    2. Evaluates PEEP measured by the flow-analyser
    3. Evaluates the calculated VT in [VT_FlowAnalyser]
  • (CleanUp)-Block: Stops ventilation.

testSectionDTOList.title: Pressure Values: Tidal value and PEEP-->

testElementDTOList.targetRawValue: Due to high airway resistance, the pressure delivered by the DUT though the tubing is higher. Therefore, the volume change in the tubing cannot be neglected anymore, this test checks the compensation is correctly applied.

title: PPSV.0001 : ((S)CMV) adult/pediatric automatic) Check Pressure values Vt / PEEP
